descriptors: I am a puppet animated by fairy magic. The lies I tell become reality for a short time.
agenda: Living a carefree life without responsibility
I don't want to abandon Sinalunga and my new friend Lucino, but I'm always afraid that Geppetto and Antonio will catch me

gifts.name: Lies
gifts.description: Carlo can bring the lies he tells to life by creating a Descriptor that allows him to perform incredible feats. All lies must be centered on him. For example: I can walk through walls or I am invisible to the human eye. The effects of the lies' power are literal. For this reason, Carlo would not be able to go through a closed door and he would be seen by animals. The effect of Lies lasts for 1 Scene or until a new lie is told.

system.background: A wooden puppet animated by fairy magic from an enchanted oak tree. By nature, Carlo cannot speak even a single word of truth. His lies convinced Geppetto and Antonio that they needed to flay people alive for their experiments. Horrified by what he caused, Carlo escaped to Sinalunga where he disguises himself as a real child every morning using his powers. Attends school and has befriended Lucino. Wears old elegant shoes given to him by Geppetto. Currently hiding at Villa Balocchi, paying the innkeeper with stones temporarily transformed into gold coins.
system.notes: Carlo unwittingly created the horror in Sinalunga but is not evil - he's terrified of being caught by Geppetto and Antonio. Can be redeemed if Hunters gain his trust. Azzurra's spirit wants to use his fairy magic to return to life.
